headline: Rally House Launches on DoorDash, Bringing Fan Gear and Local Merchandise Straight to Customers’ Doors
summary: KANSAS CITY, Mo., April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Rally House, a premier retailer of officially licensed collegiate and professional apparel, gifts, and locally inspired merchandise, is proud to announce its launch on DoorDash, making it easier than ever for fans to shop their favorite team gear and hometown products on-demand. headline: DoorDash Expands DashPass Beyond Delivery in Canada with Lyft Partnership
summary: TORONTO, April 30, 2026--DoorDash (NASDAQ: DASH) and Lyft (NASDAQ: LYFT) today announced their partnership expansion into Canada, expanding the value of DashPass by introducing rideshare savings for members. DashPass is DoorDash’s membership program designed to help consumers save on everyday purchases, offering $0 delivery fees and reduced service fees on eligible orders.

headline: Matternet Appoints Sanjay Kotte to Board of Directors
summary: MOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., April 30, 2026--Matternet, the world's only FAA Type-Certified drone delivery platform, today announced that Sanjay Kotte, Chief Commercial Officer of Robinhood Money, has joined its Board of Directors. Mr. Kotte was previously Head of Strategic Partnerships at DoorDash, where for nearly seven years he signed and scaled global restaurant partnerships that helped grow the business into a leading on-demand delivery platform.
